answer:
<think> The FIFA U-20 World Cup is an international football tournament for players under the age of 20. Argentina has produced several talented footballers in the past. Sergio Agüero is a renowned Argentine footballer who started his career at a young age. To find the year when Agüero won the FIFA U-20 Golden Shoe, I need to determine the hosting country and the year of the tournament where he received this award. I will first search for the years and hosting countries of the FIFA U-20 World Cup and then look for the specific year when Agüero won the Golden Shoe. </think>

<answer> The 2007 FIFA U-20 World Cup was hosted by Canada. Sergio Agüero was the top scorer of the tournament with 7 goals, earning him the FIFA U-20 Golden Shoe. Therefore, the 2007 FIFA U-20 World Cup is the answer. </answer>

<boxed> 2007 </boxed>
